Klasse CryptanalysisGAConfig

java.lang.Object
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.CryptanalysisGAConfig
public class CryptanalysisGAConfig extends Object
Configuration class for setting up a genetic algorithm (GA) used for classical cipher cryptanalysis. This class bundles all GA parameters, operators, statistical language models (n-grams), and data services required to evaluate candidate solutions.

The configuration can be created with default values or overridden using an external AppConfig.

    Modifikator und Typ

    Crossover<Character>

    Crossover operator used to recombine parent solutions.

    crossoverRate
    Probability that crossover is applied during reproduction.
    CipherDataService
    dataService
    Service providing cipher text and statistical data.
    FitnessFunction<Character>
    fitnessFunction
    Fitness function evaluating the quality of candidate decryptions.
    int
    maxGenerations
    Maximum number of generations the GA will run.
    Mutation<Character>
    mutation
    Mutation operator used to introduce variation.
    double
    mutationRate
    Probability that mutation is applied to offspring.
    int
    populationSize
    Size of the population used by the GA.
    Random
    random
    Random number generator used by GA components.
    Selection<Character>
    selection
    Selection operator used to choose parents for reproduction.
    Map<String,Double>
    targetBigrams
    Target bigram frequencies for the language model.

    targetQuadrigrams
    Target quadrigram frequencies for the language model.

    Target trigram frequencies for the language model.

    Target unigram frequencies for the language model.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    CryptanalysisGAConfig(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput, String cipherText, AppConfig appConfig)
    Creates a configuration for the cryptanalysis GA and optionally overrides default parameters using values from AppConfig.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    GeneticAlgorithm<Character>
    createGeneticAlgorithm(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput)
    Creates a fully configured GeneticAlgorithm instance using the parameters and operators defined in this configuration.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Felddetails

    • populationSize

      public int populationSize
      Size of the population used by the GA.

    • crossoverRate

      public double crossoverRate
      Probability that crossover is applied during reproduction.

    • mutationRate

      public double mutationRate
      Probability that mutation is applied to offspring.

    • maxGenerations

      public int maxGenerations
      Maximum number of generations the GA will run.

    • selection

      public Selection<Character> selection
      Selection operator used to choose parents for reproduction.

    • crossover

      public Crossover<Character> crossover
      Crossover operator used to recombine parent solutions.

    • mutation

      public Mutation<Character> mutation
      Mutation operator used to introduce variation.

    • fitnessFunction

      public FitnessFunction<Character> fitnessFunction
      Fitness function evaluating the quality of candidate decryptions.

    • random

      public Random random
      Random number generator used by GA components.

    • dataService

      public CipherDataService dataService
      Service providing cipher text and statistical data.

    • cipherText

      public String cipherText
      The encrypted text to be analyzed.

    • targetUnigrams

      public Map<Character, Double> targetUnigrams
      Target unigram frequencies for the language model.

    • targetBigrams

      public Map<String,Double> targetBigrams
      Target bigram frequencies for the language model.

    • targetTrigrams

      public Map<String,Double> targetTrigrams
      Target trigram frequencies for the language model.

    • targetQuadrigrams

      public Map<String,Double> targetQuadrigrams
      Target quadrigram frequencies for the language model.

    • commonWords

      public Set<String> commonWords

    • useDictionaryBonus

      public boolean useDictionaryBonus

    • wordMatchBonus

      public int wordMatchBonus

    • autoMergeUmlauts

      public boolean autoMergeUmlauts

  • Konstruktordetails

    • CryptanalysisGAConfig

      public CryptanalysisGAConfig(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput, String cipherText, AppConfig appConfig)
      Creates a configuration for the cryptanalysis GA and optionally overrides default parameters using values from AppConfig.
      Parameter:
      consoleOutput - console output handler for logging
      cipherText - the encrypted text to analyze
      appConfig - optional external configuration; may be null

  • Methodendetails

    • createGeneticAlgorithm

      public GeneticAlgorithm<Character> createGeneticAlgorithm(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput)
      Creates a fully configured GeneticAlgorithm instance using the parameters and operators defined in this configuration.
      Parameter:
      consoleOutput - console output handler for logging
      Gibt zurück:
      a ready-to-run genetic algorithm instance
      Löst aus:
      IllegalStateException - if required GA components are missing
